name: Scarlet's Haunted Hotel
short_description: Help Scarlet unravel the mystery of the nightmare hotel and experience a dark romance.
detailed_description:
A young mother goes to a seaside hotel run by her distant relative. It turns out that she may inherit the resort, but she begins to be haunted by bloody visions, and soon a man dies in suspicious circumstances. Will Scarlet keep her cool and indifferent heart in the face of danger?

A dark story in which the esoteric mixes with the normal. Late 19th century, United States. The Harrington family goes on their most memorable vacation yet. Once on the island, the world begins to descend into a nightmare. Will you be able to help the heroine before it's too late?

FEATURES:
- The darkest Time Management this year!
- A crime and ghost story set in 19th century America.
- Help Scarlet discover the mystery of the crime.
- Immerse yourself in 60 levels of addictive storyline.
- Experience a dark romance.
- Experience 5 dark, unique locations with unique tasks.
- Prove your dexterity and cunning in numerous mini-games.
- A story for mature audiences who are looking for good stories.
- Choose one of the three available difficulty levels.W
- And remember! Holidays by the sea will never be the same again...

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil
